objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: trend_supertrend
archetype: trend_supertrend
family: trend
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- supertrend(atr_period=16, multiplier=4.0)
- adx(period=15)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: supertrend.direction == 1 and adx.adx > 30
- short: supertrend.direction == -1 and adx.adx > 30
exit:
- condition: direction_change(supertrend.direction) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.0
tp_atr_mult: 5.5
description: ATR trailing stop (2.0x) and take-profit (5.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: A combination of Supertrend, ADX and ATR indicators helps to identify trending and volatile markets, while trailing stop-loss with ATR multiple improves risk management.
Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy uses indicators such as supertrend, adx and atr to generate buy and sell signals. It also has risk management parameters in place like stop loss and take profit levels. The fallback contract is proposed if the current one doesn't work. This plan needs further refinement and testing before implementation.
[Backup plan] 1) Identify any weaknesses of the strategy and address them accordingly. 2) If results are poor, try adjusting parameters such as atr multiplier or adx period to improve performance. 3) For mediocre Sharpe ratio, consider adding more indicators or using different exit strategies. 4) Explore alternative approaches like machine learning models if current one fails.
